channel.title: SSH on Not a Peeker of Nature
channel.description: Recent content in SSH on Not a Peeker of Nature

item.title: SSH service
item.description: SSH service Why? There are two main reasons for me to start SSH service on WSL: It’s convenient for me to operate my host machine in the lab. As long as there is a low-end, lightweight MacBook, we can deal with some tasks with SSH connecting to my host machine How? I tried many tutorials on the Internet, most of them don’t work. So, I want to record how to do it step by step (Reference blog).
